violations.description: Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. Flat top grill is not completely under the hood ventilation system. Flat top should be completely under the ventilation system.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Sections of wall behind the flat top grill were found covered with aluminum foil. This is not designed for use as a wall covering and is not a cleanable surface.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Wall behind the flat top grill was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. Acoustic ceiling tiles in kitchen were found with water damage. These should be replaced with nonabsorbent tiles.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)

Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
